case_title: PACIFIC GAS AND ELECTRIC COMPANY VS STACY & WITBECK COMPANY

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,329.01 FILED BY PACIFIC GAS AND ELECTRIC COMPANY AS TO DEFENDANT STACY & WITBECK COMPANY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-20-1992 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 05
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT STACY & WITBECK COMPANY

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PACIFIC GAS AND ELECTRIC COMPANY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT STACY & WITBECK COMPANY $2,329.01 PRINCIPAL, $36.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,365.51 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT STACY & WITBECK COMPANY
